query:
SELECT rpd.*, u.name as corretor_nome 
FROM resumoPresencaDiaria rpd 
LEFT JOIN users u ON rpd.corretorId = u.id 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%' 
ORDER BY rpd.data DESC 
LIMIT 10;
